Welcome To Stepping Stones
With over 14 years of experience and five centres across Malta, Stepping Stones is the ideal place for your little ones. We open from Monday to Friday from 6.00am to 6.00pm. Extra hours on demand. We cater for children from 2 months up to 3 years.
Learn More
  Meet The Team
A dedicated team that has been growing and developing together. We strive to be professional and always ready to help.
Learn More
Mission Statement
We provide an environment in which all children are supported to reach their full potential.
Learn More
Curriculum
A flexible curriculum that adapts to reflect children's individual needs. Tailored to reach every developmental goal. 
Learn More
What they say
A big thank you to all the staff at Stepping Stones B’Kara for the great work you did with Jake! He started Kinder 1 yesterday without a single tear. He just walked into his classroom, put his bag down and started playing with some toys :))) Couldn’t believe it!!!!! I am so happy because he is so happy and it’s all thanks to you :))) Mary Degaetano
      it was an nice experience for our princess kelsey,she really enjoyed it and learned a lot,she is going to miss u all ! thanks for everything xxxxxxxxxxx
Ruth Micallef
And today was Benji’s last day at Stepping Stones. A year of amazing fun for my little one. Thanks to all of the special teachers at Qawra xxxx
Alison Mifsud
